title: Power of the Void
description: Access the deadly power of the void, wield it against your foes or succumb to it's might.
body:
'The void is everlasting, the void is all consuming. To harness such power...'

**Welcome to the Power of the Void**

This mod adds new concepts focused around the void we've all fallen into once or twice. It's an endgame content mod that adds OP mechanics at a high cost.

**Current Features**

+ New ores to find in the deepslate layer.
+ New tools to work towards.

**Planned Features**

+ New magic system based around the void.
+ New abandoned structures to explore around the world.
+ New hostile mobs.
+ New dimension? (Still being decided)

Please note: I'm trying to keep this page as spoiler free as possible, for a more in-depth/spoiler riddled description please refer to the [GitLab Wiki](https://gitlab.com/NovaCrypt/VoidPowers_MC-Mod/-/wikis/Getting-Started).

Also note: We are not accepting bug reports until the 1.0 release. 

This mod is currently in Alpha, do not expect everything to work as intended. Features and mechanics may change before final release.
